queries.sql: select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1

select `currencies`.*, `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` as `pivot_currency_id` from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `customers` where `email` = 'buyer@buyer.com' and `channel_id` = '1'
select count(*) as aggregate from `customers` where `phone` = '1234567890'

messages.message:
[21:20:26] LOG.debug: From: Shop To: buyer@buyer.com Subject: New Customer Registration MIME-Version: 1.0 Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 21:20:26 +0500 Message-ID: <6fbba47109c3b7905f6ec41d745fa8a9@example.com> Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable

Dear Sami Ullah, 👋

Welcome and thank you for registering with us!

Your account has now been created successfully and you can login using your email address and password credentials. Upon logging in, you will be able to access other services including reviewing past orders, wishlists and editing your account information.

Sign in

If you need any kind of help please contact us at .
Thanks!

statements.sql: select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1

select `currencies`.*, `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` as `pivot_currency_id` from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `customers` where `email` = 'buyer@buyer.com' and `channel_id` = '1'
select count(*) as aggregate from `customers` where `phone` = '1234567890'

select column_name as `name`, data_type as `type_name`, column_type as `type`, collation_name as `collation`, is_nullable as `nullable`, column_default as `default`, column_comment as `comment`, generation_expression as `expression`, extra as `extra` from information_schema.columns where table_schema = 'shop' and table_name = 'addresses' order by ordinal_position asc

mails.subject: New Customer Registration
mails.headers:
From: Shop <shop@example.com>
To: buyer@buyer.com
Subject: New Customer Registration
mails.html:
Dear Sami Ullah, 👋

Welcome and thank you for registering with us!

Your account has now been created successfully and you can login using your email address and password credentials. Upon logging in, you will be able to access other services including reviewing past orders, wishlists and editing your account information.

Sign in

If you need any kind of help please contact us at .
Thanks!
